summary: Frontend testing complete for Sales Follow-up date filter, Site Visit date filter, and Pre-Sales Appointment Booked card. All features verified working correctly.

issues: Minor: Console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement needed

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) CRMSales date filter bar with from/to dates and Today button works correctly. 2) Follow-up stage filters leads by date and sorts ascending. 3) Site Visit stages (Client Land, Our Projects) also apply date filter. 4) Moving lead to Follow-up stage intercepts and shows date picker dialog with confirm button. 5) Pre-Sales Appointment Booked card shows count 3 with green styling and filters when clicked.

CRMSales Date Filter Bar.details: Date filter bar renders with from date (defaults to today), end date, and Today button. data-testid attributes: followup-date-filter, followup-date-end-filter, followup-today-btn

CRMSales Follow-up Date Filtering.details: When date set to 2026-03-21, Follow-up column shows 2 leads (Harini, TEST_RoughReq_ef8f94) with dates '21 Mar'. When date is today (2026-03-28), shows 0 leads - correct behavior.

CRMSales Follow-up Ascending Sort.details: Leads in Follow-up column are sorted ascending by follow-up date. Code verified at line 746-750 in CRMSales.jsx.

CRMSales Site Visit Date Filter.details: Site Visit (Client Land) and Site Visit (Our Projects) stages apply same date filter. Code verified at line 710 - dateFilterStages includes stg_sv_client_land and stg_sv_ongoing_project.

CRMSales Follow-up Dialog Intercept.details: Moving lead to Follow-up stage intercepts at line 189 and shows date picker dialog. Dialog has Follow-up Date field, Note field, Cancel and Schedule buttons. Confirm button has data-testid='confirm-followup-btn'.

CRMSales Today Button.details: Today button resets date filter to today and clears end date. Verified via UI testing.

CRMPreSales Appointment Booked Card.details: Card visible in top stats section with green styling (bg-green-50 border-green-300). Shows count 3 from dashboard.stages. Has data-testid='appointment-booked-card'.

CRMPreSales Appointment Booked Filter.details: Clicking Appointment Booked card filters to that stage. Shows 3 leads (Vinoth, Harini, Mr. Vinoth) in Appointment Booked column.
